description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Deploy Doxygen that triggers on push to the develop branch. Run an ubuntu-20.04 job that checks out the repository with LFS support, skips if the commit message contains 'doc skip', updates dependencies, configures a Doxygen preset with CMake, builds Doxygen documentation, and deploys it to the gh-pages branch using JamesIves/github-pages-deploy-action.
